answer: In 2023, Tokyo's city proper had over 14 million residents, while the Greater Tokyo Area had 41 million in 2024. The metro area population of Tokyo was 37,115,000 in 2024, a slight decline from 2023.

results.title: Tokyo, Japan Metro Area Population (1950-2026) - Macrotrends
results.snippet: ... population of Tokyo in 2025 was 37,036,000, a 0.21% decline from 2024. The metro area population of Tokyo in 2024 was 37,115,000, a 0.21% decline from 2023.
